title: Surgeon Vacancy at Manipal Hospitals - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Manipal Hospitals - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Manipal Hospitals has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Manipal Hospitals:
Manipal Hospitals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Hospitals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
